data.name: 逃離性慾服侍人偶的房間
data.detailed_description:
【與爆乳機器人「艾夏」一起以逃出密室為目標!】

 

 ◆故事介紹

 

當你睜開眼時,發現躺在一間從沒看過的房間
看起來像是被囚禁起來了

而在這間密室中除了你以外還有一個人...不,是一台自稱「性慾服侍人偶艾夏」的女性型機器人

你要與艾夏合作,目標是逃出這個神祕的房間!
有時還可以從艾夏那邊得到非常特別且熱烈的「服務」――。

 ◆系統介紹

 

 (1)經典的密室逃脫遊戲

 
主軸是逃脫遊戲。
找出房間內的道具,解出謎題,逃離房間就是您的最終目標!

 (2)來自艾夏的協助

 
把發現的道具交給艾夏查看後就能得到逃脫的提示!
而且之後可能還有需要艾夏的幫助才能逃脫的時刻......？

 (3)服侍玩法與好感度

 
在解謎途中,不論何時都可以選擇接受艾夏的服侍,
艾夏有好感度的機制,當好感度上升後會增加可服侍的項目
好感度會隨著與艾夏說話以及用道具跟艾夏互動而上升喔!

※為了不擅長解謎或是密室逃脫的玩家們也準備了超貼心的「相簿開放功能」!



 【以胸部為重的 3D 動畫！】

 

為了完美重現胸部的柔軟、質感以及重量感的第一人稱3D動畫!
爆乳在您眼前搖晃、彈跳、任您宰割~
享受桃山プロダクション老師引以為傲的巨乳特效

服侍技巧:
口交
膝上乳交
騎馬乳交
乳交+口交
艾夏上位口交
...... 等等。


 【角色介紹】

 

性慾服務人偶-艾夏(CV:桃音たぉ)

年齡:22歲
身高:162cm
體重:相比人類女性再稍微重一點(因為體內的機械構造以及一對碩大的胸部)
三圍:B112-W63-H82(P cup)

與主角被關在一起的機器人
會稱呼所有在這個房間裡的人為「主人」
專門為了服侍主人而被製造出來的

為了保護超高性能的眼睛,所以平常都會把眼睛遮起來
內褲樣式是為了能隨時隨地服務主人而設計的

非常認真且忠誠的性格,只要是主人的命令就都一定會遵守

data.short_description: 與爆乳機器人「性慾服侍人偶艾夏」一起逃離這個充滿謎題的房間! 經典的密室逃脫與超強3D胸部動畫的全新遊戲組合, 桃山プロダクション老師將為我們帶來超柔軟超有質感的胸部體驗,爆乳動畫絕對不能錯過! 您最後能將所有的謎題解開,安全逃離這個密室嗎?
data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Escape from the Room of the Serving Doll
data.detailed_description:
【Escape the secret room with Aisha, a breast-expanding robot!】

 

 ◆Story Overview

 

Upon opening your eyes, you find yourself in a room you've never seen before, seemingly imprisoned.

In this confined space, there's not just you but also someone else—or rather, a female android claiming to be 「Serving Doll Aisha」.

Collaborate with Aisha to achieve the goal of escaping this mysterious room! Sometimes, you may even receive special and passionate 「services」 from Aisha.

◆ System Overview

 (1)Classic Escape Room Game!

 

The main focus is the escape. Find room items, solve puzzles, and escape to meet your ultimate goal!

 (2)Assistance from Aisha!

 

Hand over discovered items to Aisha for hints on escaping! There might be moments when you need Aisha's help to escape.

 (3)Servitude Gameplay and Favorability

 

During the puzzle-solving, you can choose to accept Aisha's services at any time. Aisha has a favorability mechanism: As it increases, more service options become available. Favorability rises as you talk to Aisha and interact with her using items!

※ For players not adept at puzzles or escape rooms, a thoughtful 「Album Open Function」 is prepared!

 【3D Animation Centered Around Breasts!】

 

Perfectly replicated softness, texture, and weighty feel of breasts in first-person 3D animation! Boobs sway, bounce, and are at your mercy, right before your eyes~ Enjoy the proud, busty effects presented by 桃山プロダクション.

Service Skills：

Oral

Lap Pillow Titjob

Cowgirl Titjob

Titjob + Oral

Aisha on Top Oral

...And more.

 【Characters】

 

Serving Doll—Aisha (CV:桃音たぉ)

Age: 22

Height: 162cm

Weight: Slightly heavier than human females (due to internal mechanical structure and large breasts)

Measurements: B112-W63-H82 (P cup)

The robot is confined with the protagonist, addressing everyone in the room as "Master." Specifically manufactured to serve her Master, Aisha covers her eyes to protect her highly advanced optics. Her underwear is designed for immediate and constant service to her Master.

With a diligent and loyal personality, she unquestionably follows all commands of her Master.

data.short_description: Embark on a journey to escape this enigmatic room with the busty robot, 「Serving Doll Aisha」! A novel combination of classic escape-room challenges and cutting-edge 3D chest animations awaits you. Can you solve all the puzzles in the end and safely escape this Escape Room?
data.supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
